mods.title: Less Building Placement Restrictions - v7.5.5
mods.description:
[img]https://i.imgur.com/1z8wvbf.gif[/img]

[url=https://zap-hosting.com/betterbuildersbureau][img]https://i.imgur.com/kDRDLfE.gif[/img][/url]

Get 20% off using this code: [b]betterbuildersbureau[/b]

[quote]Please use ModControlPanel as required to access the LBPR settings.[/quote]

[h1][b][u]Mod Updating Guidelines[/u][/b][/h1]

If you are having trouble updating the mod, we have documentation on our discord to help assist you with common troubleshooting steps. 

If you are using a Xbox Game Pass or Epic Games version of Conan Exiles and wish to download mods from Steam, visit this forum link with directions on how you can do that. If this is too challenging for you, please join our discord and we will provide you with a Google Drive download link for all Multigun mods. 

[url=https://forums.funcom.com/t/egs-dedi-windows-downloading-mods-from-steam/183083][u]How to Download Mods From Steam[/u][/url]

[h1][b][u]Important Info[/u][/b][/h1]

[code][b]Mod id:[/b]1369743238[/code]

[quote=] [b]Communication[/b]
 
Please direct questions, comments, concerns, feedback, and bug reports to our Discord. All documentation is also only found on Discord.

The Discord is also home to a dedicated group of veteran volunteer builders who love to help others (The Build Guild). We also have a building tips channel containing dozens of tips, show and tell, and finally a channel specifically for showcasing your finished builds! If you want a place to talk about building and decorating with other passionate players, or a place to get help with your designs, the Better Builders Bureau is the place to be! Hit the button below to join. 

[url=https://discord.gg/gbAjAgS][img]https://i.imgur.com/bPcwSl5.png[/img][/url] [/quote]

[h1][b][u]Description of Mod[/u][/b][/h1]

The Less Building Placement Restrictions (LBPR) mod is intended to make building and placement easier. It offers a wide, and ever growing list of features that can make your building dreams come true. The mod has been carefully crafted over the years to offer an ever growing library of features for both admins and players. 

And, all the major features of LBPR can be toggled on or off for your server or single player playthrough as you desire!

[h1][b][u]Highlights[/u][/b][/h1]
[list] [*] Build anywhere you want to, whether that's an NPC camp, a dungeon, or a cave. This can be toggled so that anybody can build anywhere, just admin's, or nobody (this is off by default). 

Note: While the game now offers a server setting (as of 3.0) for building anywhere (everyone only), thralls still can't be placed in those areas. LBPR continues to offer better control and flexibility for this. 

[*] Many blockers that can be enabled (vanilla) or disabled as desired. 

[*] Follower placement is easier then ever with it's own sets of toggles. 

[*] Green Arrow directionals to help make building placement easier to understand (can also be configured by players to also turn on Funcom arrows if they so wish too). 

[*] Dozens of custom overlap exceptions made for a multitude of different building scenarios, offering more freedom than ever to help you reach your building goals. 

[*] Restoration of the 'TAB' keyboard shortcut to view building info (Health, Decay, Stability, etc). 

[*] Client toggles to set whether the building/placeable will appear as a green ghost preview or as a solid object

[*] Tons of Admin options to customize your server the way you want it to be (see the 2nd screenshot in the Gallery)[/list]

[h1][b][u]Less Building Placement Restrictions Load Order[/u][/b][/h1]

Here is a list of my mods related to Less Building Placement Restrictions (LBPR)
[quote=]
[list]
[*]Any mod that modifies or creates new buildings, placeables, pets, or thralls. (Pythagoras, LBPR - AF, etc)
[*]Unlock Plus
[*]LBPR[/list][/quote]

For a list of known mod conflicts, please visit the documentation that is linked on the discord. 

[h1][b][u]Recommended Mods to use with LBPR[/u][/b][/h1]
[list]
[*] Pippi (Pippi Move Tool, Thespians, etc)
[*] Unlock Plus (Resource Pulling, Speed Adjustment while Building, etc)
[*][url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=1444947329] LBPR - Additional Features[/url] 
[*][url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2723987721] Pythagoras: Expanded Building [/url][/list]

[h1][b][u]Troubleshooting, Known Issues and Other Important Information[/u][/b][/h1]

For a list of common troubleshooting steps, please visit the discord and ask for the LBPR documentation. 

[h1][b][u]Toggle Features[/u][/b][/h1]

LBPR features full Toggle controls to allow admins the ability to configure their servers as desired. This requires  [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=1823412793]ModControlPanel[/url]. The default method to access ModControlPanel (after its installed) is by pressing Shift + End. For other methods to access MCP, visit the workshop page for MCP. 

Most of the toggles are fairly self explanatory, but if you want additional information, there is documentation available on the Discord that should answer all your questions. The number of customization options is extensive and ever expanding. We will continue to add more options for server admins as time allows. 

We do have documentation available, however the LBPR guide is a Google Drive Spreadsheet, and Steam doesn't like Google Drive Spreadsheets for some reason and prevents me from sharing the link. Please visit the discord. 

[quote][h1][b][u]Update Policy[/u][/b][/h1]
[list]
[*] I will update my mods on my terms and my terms alone. If you don't like my update schedule, don't use the mods. 

[*] Mismatch errors are not the fault of mod creators. If you need help understanding this concept, visit the discord.

[/quote]

[b][url=https://steamcommunity.com/id/multigun/myworkshopfiles/?appid=440900]Multi's Other Mod's Can be Found by Clicking Here![/url][/b]

[b][url=https://steamcommunity.com/profiles/76561198035045999/myworkshopfiles/?appid=440900]Hades Other Mod's Can be Found by Clicking Here![/url][/b]

[b][url=https://steamcommunity.com/profiles/76561198099660583/myworkshopfiles/?appid=440900]Alrenstorm's Other Mod's Can be Found by Clicking Here![/url][/b]

mods.title: Better Thralls v2.3.4-legacy (Feature Complete)
mods.description:
[h3]IMPORTANT[/h3]
[h3][b]===============  =============  ===========  =========  =======  =====  ===[/b][/h3]
This is the [b]Legacy[/b] version of this mod. It will [b]NOT[/b] work with the Enhanced version of the game.

[h3]FEATURE COMPLETE[/h3]
[h3][b]===============  =============  ===========  =========  =======  =====  ===[/b][/h3]
All of my mods are 'feature complete' for the time being. There will be no new features or major updates. If a game update requires a mod update, I will do it when I have time. This is totally independent of the game update.

[b]Mod-ID: 931088249[/b]

[h3][b]> FEATURES <[/b][/h3]
[h3][b]===============  =============  ===========  =========  =======  =====  ===[/b][/h3]
[b]Pickup Thralls / Pets[/b]
Thralls and pets can be picked up again (if the inventory of the thrall / pet is empty). If you pickup a thrall/pet with the new level system, you will lose all progress. The thrall/pet starts with level 0 and new random stats!

[b]Additional Followers[/b]
The default setting for the additional followers is 3 (3+1/2 original follower of the game). Max value: 10

[b]Fall Damage Reduction[/b]
Reduce the fall damage to thralls / pets. No more elevator suicide of your favorite thrall / pet.

[b]Warcry[/b]
A system similar to the whistle system from ARK - give commands to all your thralls in range.
Press [b]T[/b] (default keybinding) to open the warcry menu.

[b]Lamplighter[/b]
New thrall: the lamplighter. Placed in your own base, she/he will take care of your lighting.

[h3][b]> EXPERIMENTAL FEATURES <[/b][/h3]
[h3][b]===============  =============  ===========  =========  =======  =====  ===[/b][/h3]
  Note: experimental features are OFF by default!

[b]Force Truncheon[/b]
Following Thralls will always try to use the same weapon type (lethal/non-lethal) as the player.

[b]Thrall Carry[/b]
Thralls, horses and pets can drag unconscious thralls.

[h3][b]> FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS <[/b][/h3]
[h3][b]===============  =============  ===========  =========  =======  =====  ===[/b][/h3]
  See [url=https://testerle.net/better-thralls-qa/]Better Thralls - Q&A[/url] 

[h3][b]> MOD SETTINGS <[/b][/h3]
[h3][b]===============  =============  ===========  =========  =======  =====  ===[/b][/h3]
  See [url=https://testerle.net/better-thralls-qa/]Better Thralls - Q&A[/url] for the available options and their usage.

[h3][b]> SUPPORT <[/b][/h3]
[h3][b]===============  =============  ===========  =========  =======  =====  ===[/b][/h3]
  If you enjoy my mods, please consider donating! Any support is greatly appreciated!

[url=https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted_button_id=GQCZ5L3Y6EEB8][img]https://i.imgur.com/sYr61dY.gif[/img][/url]

[h3][b]> MY MODS <[/b][/h3]
[h3][b]===============  =============  ===========  =========  =======  =====  ===[/b][/h3]
[list]
[*] [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=1159180273]Fashionist[/url]
[*] [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=931088249]Better Thralls[/url]
[*] [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=1639336393]Building Shortcut Bar[/url]
[*] [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=877108545]Unlock Plus[/url]
[*] [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=1396310739]Stacksize Plus[/url]
[/list]

[h3][b]> PREVIOUS VERSIONS <[/b][/h3]
[h3][b]===============  =============  ===========  =========  =======  =====  ===[/b][/h3]
  Only available after a mod update and for limited time:
https://testerle.net/mod-downloads/

[h3][b]> NO COMMENTS? <[/b][/h3]
[h3][b]===============  =============  ===========  =========  =======  =====  ===[/b][/h3]
  Discord is where the discussions take place. I am a single person who has real life commitments, so my response time may vary. For this reason, the discussions take place in Discord. There you will find a great community to support you when I am not available.

[url=https://discord.gg/2zQuN9F][img]https://steamuserimages-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/1487831460518703791/B60FD3A13C5C9FCA7AAB060A904E3C6DAA48F8E7/[/img][/url]

[h3][b]===============  =============  ===========  =========  =======  =====  ===[/b][/h3]
This mod contains assets (art, music, code, items, systems and/or designs) that are the intellectual property of Funcom Oslo AS or their licensors.

mods.title: [Legacy] Pippi - User & Server Management - v3.9.14
mods.description:
[h1]Pippi - User & Server Management[/h1]
ID: 880454836
Version : 3.9.14
[url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/880454836]Update Notes[/url]

[url=https://daftlyoddsoftware.com/Pippi/dist/]Looking for a previous version?[/url]

Should work in Singleplayer/Co-op Multiplayer & Dedicated Environments (Should hehe)	

[h1]What is Pippi?[/h1]
Pippi is a mod created for Conan Exiles by the user Joshtech a.k.a. CoOkIeMoNsTeR. What is Pippi? In short, it is many things. Pippi offers admins the ability to easily operate their servers and maintain their player base. They can enlist the help of moderators without giving them full access to the admin panel. Admins also have the option to enhance their players’ game play by creating kits, establish warp points for fast travel, and easily change character names, levels, and skill points. That is just to name a few features.

[u][b]Features:[/b][/u][list]
    [*]New Chat System (Front-end and back-end)
    [*]New Placement System for Pippi Tools
    [*]Kit System
    [*]Command System
    [*]Announcement System
    [*]Warp System
    [*]MOTD System
    [*]Rule System
    [*]Player System
    [*]Dynamic Rank System
    [*]Checkpoint System
    [*]Mushi System
    [*]Clan Management
    [*]TEvent System
[/list]

[h1]What is Mushi?[/h1]
Mushi is a visual scripting language written for Conan Exiles (Unreal Engine Games) written entirely from scratch by Joshtech. It has been designed with both beginners and advanced users in mind. Mushi allows admins to create unique experiences for their players, these experiences range from story lines, custom npc interaction, simple/advanced quests and much more.

[u][b]Pippi Toolsets[/b][/u][list]
    [*]NPCSpawners
        Create customised Dungeons/Arenas
    [*]Glorbs
        Create customised lighting
    [*]LootSpawners
        Create customised loot chests
    [*]Portals
        Create visible entry points for warps
    [*]Thespians
        Create actors that animate and bring life to your villages
   [*]Wallpapers
        Load images from the web directly into your game
    [*]Flaggies
        Load images from the web directly into your game to display as a flag
    [*]Notes
        Create your own custom notes for players
    [*]CamLoc - Experimental
        Camera rig system
    [*]MusiqBox - InProgress
        Stream audio directly from the internet
[/list]

Video explain the kits a little bit:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nUUSZhOg6UU

The AMAZING ContastX & Fia have made excellent guides for using Pippi!
[url=http://www.daftlyoddsoftware.com/Pippi/dist/docs/Pippi_Guide_3rd_Edition.pdf]Click HERE![/url] For the Pippi Manual
[url=https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/387738447143632897/419500233781673984/1.8.1_to_1.8.3_Pippi_Addendum.pdf]Click HERE![/url] For the Pippi Manual Addendum
[url=https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/387738447143632897/419500233781673984/1.8.1_to_1.8.3_Pippi_Addendum.pdf]Click HERE![/url] For the Pippi Social Merchant Manual
[url=http://daftlyoddsoftware.com/Pippi/dist/docs/Pippi_MushiSystem.pdf]Click HERE![/url] For the Pippi Mushi Manual

Pippi now has it's own Discord:
[url=https://discord.com/invite/brZ8Uwz]Discord Link[/url]
Feel free to join and discuss issues with other Pippi Users, or just to hang out and chat!


If you have any suggestions please feel free to post in the discussion or contact me on discord :p



Legal
This mod contains assets (art, music, code, items, systems and/or designs) that are the intellectual property of Funcom Oslo AS or their licensors

All other assets (art, music, code, items, systems and/or designs) contained within this mod are the intellectual property of DaftlyOdd Software and/or licensed to.

mods.title: Stacksize Plus v1.8.7-legacy (Compatible with all DLC and Mod items) (Feature Complete)
mods.description:
[h3]IMPORTANT[/h3]
[h3][b]===============  =============  ===========  =========  =======  =====  ===[/b][/h3]
This is the [b]Legacy[/b] version of this mod. It will [b]NOT[/b] work with the Enhanced version of the game.

[h3]FEATURE COMPLETE[/h3]
[h3][b]===============  =============  ===========  =========  =======  =====  ===[/b][/h3]
All of my mods are 'feature complete' for the time being. There will be no new features or major updates. If a game update requires a mod update, I will do it when I have time. This is totally independent of the game update.

[b]Mod-ID: 1396310739[/b]

[h3][b]> DESCRIPTION <[/b][/h3]
[h3][b]===============  =============  ===========  =========  =======  =====  ===[/b][/h3]
The ultimate stack size mod. Configurable stack size, also for DLC items and items from other mods!

Freely adjustable stack size multiplier from 1 to 100
> non-stackable items (stack size 1) remain non-stackable

[b]Attention:[/b] Changes to the settings only take effect when stacks are moved between inventories/containers.

[h3][b]> MOD SETTINGS (ADMIN ONLY) <[/b][/h3]
[h3][b]===============  =============  ===========  =========  =======  =====  ===[/b][/h3]
The configuration (admin only because it's a server wide setting) can be opened from the radial menu of any placeable with an inventory, e.g. chests, crafting stations.

[b]Recommendation:[/b] restart the server after changing the settings!

[h3][b]> SUPPORT <[/b][/h3]
